title: Less Logouts; Task Creation Cancel Fix
changes: Log outs should be less frequent now (increase from 1 week of no activity to 30 days)
Bugfix: No subtasks of a new task should get created when the root-level task creation is cancelled.
Bugfix: Sync reload issue when page reloaded.

title: Time Spent Settings; Subtask Fixes
changes: Modified the configurable settings for tracking time spent on tasks (can now show/hide time spent independently of enabling In Progress status)
Bugfix: Fixed a bug where subtasks were orphaned when creating a parent task

title: Offline Support
changes: Added service worker for offline asset caching — the app now loads even without an internet connection
Automatic background updates ensure you always get the latest version

title: Changelog & Version Tracking
changes: Initial Release! Most features outlined on the How to Use page.
